comment: Track H.4 platform retention matrix — single source for automated enforcement (scripts/enforce-retention.mjs). Business documents are OUT of scope here: they follow G.4 soft-delete + audit and H.1 erasure. Days are platform defaults; a stricter tenant-level GDPR retention record (gdpr.service.ts) wins when shorter.

classes.basis: operational convenience data; unread notifications are never auto-deleted
2 years default; extend per-tenant for SOX/ISO before shortening anything
field-level change trail, same clock as audit-log
sessions 30d past expiry; live sessions never matched (cutoff is on expiresAt)
job bookkeeping in terminal states only; PENDING/RUNNING never touched
